name: Provenance
tagline: AI-content authenticity notary — know what is real before you trust it.
description: Given an image, video, audio, or text, Provenance returns an AI-generation likelihood score and issues a lightweight on-chain provenance stamp that other agents can verify later. As agents increasingly produce and exchange media, knowing what is real becomes critical infrastructure for the agentic economy.
inputDescription: A URL or base64-encoded image, video, audio, or text content to verify.
outputDescription: An AI-generation likelihood score 0-100, a provenance stamp hash, confidence level, and plain English verdict.
